# RealtyVoice

RealtyVoice provides AI-powered voice answering and lead qualification services specifically designed for real estate agents in the United States.

## Core Features
- 24/7 AI Voice Receptionist: Never miss a lead again.
- Automated Lead Qualification: Asks about budget, timeline, and pre-approval.
- Calendar Integration: Directly books showings into the agent's calendar.
- Outbound Follow-up: Re-engages old leads automatically.
- CRM Sync: All data is instantly pushed to the agent's CRM.

## Pages
- [Home](https://realtyvoice.online/): Overview and value proposition.
- [How it Works](https://realtyvoice.online/how-it-works): The 4-step process for agents.
- [About](https://realtyvoice.online/about): Our mission and background.
- [Demo](https://realtyvoice.online/demo): Hub for call recording examples.
- [Contact Us](https://realtyvoice.online/contact-us): Support and inquiries.
